data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a recipient signature for high-value items, but the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or endpoints that confirm this functionality. While the use case mentions the need for a signature, there is no concrete evidence of its implementation or testing in the prior steps. This lack of evidence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage for this specific need.
gaps: No evidence of functionality for capturing recipient signatures for high-value items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for signature capture
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the recipient signature requirement.
